titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5957

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=782 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.759806+00 | translation moa=783 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.769803+00

div.p:
Liolfus filius Elgi et heredes sui . scilicet . Cospatricius et Gamel et Makebeth et Reginaldus et Eggard Omnibus uidentibus uel au
dientibus has litteras salutem . Sciatis nos in curia prioris Coldingham et in presentia illius abiurasse si quid iuris ha
buimus in parua Ristona et illud quietum clamasse Ade filio Cospatricii et heredibus suis de nobis uel de successoribus nostris sine
omni uexatione uel reclamatione pro . septem . marcis et uno equo duarum marcarum quas nobis in presentia multorum bonorum ui
rorum dedit . et quia uolumus ut firmum sit ius iurandum fide firmauimus in manu Walteri Olifard iusticie regis illud sine
omni fraude uel reclamatione in perpetuum tenendum . Hiis testibus . Waltero Olifard iusticie regis . Roberto de Burneuile .
vicecomite . et Roberto herede suo . Ricardo Marescaldo . Patricio auunculo comitis . Ada filio Alden . et Patricio herede suo .
Gilberto Fraser et Iohanne et Bernardo filiis suis . Ricardo de Merleie . Stephano papedi . Waldeuuo de Prendergest . Edwar
do de Aldecambus et filiis suis Thoma Willelmo Stephano . Willelmo preposito . Willelmo de Nesebit . Ada filio Pace . Ada de Pren
dergest . Elya de Eytona . Ada de Lambertona . Alano de Swintona . Ricardo de Swintona . Ricardo de Lummesdene .
Vctredo filio Coleman et filio suo Ada . Waldeuuo filio Uctredi . Radulfo . filio Godwin . Ada de Bethioc . Thoma filio Si
wardi et Patricio herede suo . Ada filio Leising . Ilif filio Ogge et herede suo . Roberto coco . et Philippo del celer . et multis aliis

p.cl: Liulf son of Ælsi and his heirs, namely, Cospatric, Gamel, Macbeth, Reginald, and Ecgheard, to all who view or hear these letters send greeting.

in the court of the prior of Coldingham, and in his presence, to have abjured whatever right we have had in Little Reston and to have quitclaimed it to Adam son of Cospatric and his heirs, in respect of ourselves or our successors, without any trouble or counter-claim, in return for seven merks and one horse of two merks which he has given to us in the presence of many worthy men. And since we will that it should be firm, we have affirmed by faith the oath to be sworn, in the hands of Walter Oliphant, the king's justice, to be held for ever without any deceit or counter-claim.

With these witnesses: Walter Oliphant, the king's justice; Robert of Burneville, sheriff, and his heir, Robert; Richard the marischal; Patrick, the earl's uncle; Adam son of Aldan, and his heir, Patrick; Gilbert Fraser, and John and Bernard, his sons; Richard de Merlay; Stephen Papedy; Waldef of Prenderguest; Edward of Oldcambus and his sons, Thomas, William, Stephen; William the grieve; William of Nisbet; Adam son of Pace; Adam of Prenderguest; Elias of Ayton; Adam of Lamberton; Alan of Swinton; Richard of Swinton; Richard of Lumsdaine; Uchtred son of Colman, and Adam his son; Waldef son of Uchtred; Ralph son of Godwin; Adam of Beoch; Thomas son of Siward, and his heir, Patrick; Adam son of Leysing; Eilaf son of Oddger, and his heir; Robert the cook, and Philip of the cellar; and many others.
